3008590.name: Relics of the Oracle
3008590.description:
Long ago, the island basked in the gifts of the Oracle, an otherworldly being who offered magic to those who dared seek it. Scholars, pilgrims, and rulers alike gathered at the temple, where the Oracle whispered truths from beyond the veil.

But magic breeds corruption.

When that corruption spreads across the island, a cursed star will rise, and the world begins to fracture. Like many times before, the Oracle’s scholars give their lives to summon a servant from death itself, an ancient specter bound to the Oracle’s will.

You are that specter.

Reborn in bone, you rise once more to collect the Relic Hearts, fragments of stolen power sealed within artifacts, guardians, and living vessels. But the island remembers what you are. Its illusions shift. Its denizens deceive. It will do everything it can to keep the Relics hidden.

Unravel the island’s secrets. Feed the Oracle. Open the gates.

The cycle begins again.

- Epic Adventure: Traverse mystical temples, haunted ruins, and treacherous landscapes to recover the relics.

- Fantasy FPS Fusion: Experience a unique blend of fantasy first-person action and classic adventure game elements.

- Classic Weaponry and Spells: Arm yourself with swords, flails, daggers, crossbows, and a variety of spells to overcome the dangers that lurk in Mystique.

- Interact with the world using a variety of actions like Interact, Observe, Speak, Eat (or lick), and Smell, adding depth and humor to your journey.
